BodyName: Committee on Sanitation and Solid Waste Management

Items.Title: A Local Law to amend the administrative code of the city of New York, in relation to expanding the categories of businesses that may be subject to requirements regarding the disposal of commercial organic waste
Items.MatterName: Expanding the categories of businesses that may be subject to requirements regarding the disposal of commercial organic waste

Items.Title: A Local Law to amend the administrative code of the city of New York, in relation to repealing section 19-163.2 of such code, relating to limiting the use of adhesive stickers on motor vehicles to enforce alternate side parking rules
Items.MatterName: Repealing section 19-163.2 of such code, relating to limiting the use of adhesive stickers on motor vehicles to enforce alternate side parking rules.
